# enable / disable idempotence.

exec eon add --cron '@hourly' --name toggle -- echo hi

exec eon disable toggle
stdout 'disabled job [0-9A-Za-z]+'

# Disabling again works (idempotent within the API; status stays disabled).
exec eon disable toggle

exec eon show toggle --json
stdout '"status": "disabled"'

exec eon enable toggle
stdout 'enabled job [0-9A-Za-z]+'

exec eon show toggle --json
stdout '"status": "enabled"'

# Unknown name → exit 3.
! exec eon enable nope
! exec eon disable nope
